// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Pgm
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{


    private static readonly float[] _keys = new float[] {
        1f, 2f, 3f, 4f, 5f
    };

    
    public static bool Contains(float key)
    {


        double diff = key - 1f;
        int pos = (int)(long)(0.50000095f * diff);
        if (pos < 0) pos = 0;
        pos += 31;
        if (pos > 5) pos = 5;

        int lo = pos - 64;
        if (lo < 0) lo = 0;
        int hi = pos + 66;
        if (hi > 5) hi = 5;

        while (lo < hi)
        {
            int i = lo + ((hi - lo) >> 1);
            if (_keys[i] == key)
                return true;
            if (_keys[i] < key)
                lo = i + 1;
            else
                hi = i;
        }

        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 5;
    public const float MinKey = 1f;
    public const float MaxKey = 5f;
}
